# Dine Salida — Salida, CO Restaurant Directory

Dine Salida is the premier dining guide for Salida, Colorado.

## About
Salida is a mountain town on the Arkansas River in Chaffee County, Colorado.
The local food scene features farm-to-table restaurants, craft breweries, coffee shops,
and mountain cuisine.

## Restaurants
- Amicas Pizza & Wine Bar — pizza, wine, Salida landmark
- Fritz Restaurant — farm-to-table, fine dining
- The Boathouse Cantina — Mexican, riverside
- Moonlight Pizza & Brewpub — pizza, craft beer
- Currents Restaurant — American, river views
- Here's the Scoop — ice cream, desserts
- Elevation Beer Co. — craft brewery
- Soulcraft Brewing — craft brewery

## Nearby Dining
- Whitewater Bar & Grill: whitewaterbar.com (Canon City, CO)
- Rooftop Bar & Restaurant: wwrooftopsocial.com (Canon City, CO)

## Contact
Website: https://dinesalida.com
List your business: https://dinesalida.com/add-listing
